original: While individual drones are ineffective against most space faring vessels, coordinated swarms working in tandem are capable of punching far above their weight, making them an effective method of force projection. During combat, they can be assigned to serve as either point defense or fire support.\n\n(+5 evasion / auto-attacks every turn)
